The '''Max Rebo Duo''' was the temporary name for [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]] and [[Sy Snootles/Legends|Sy Snootles]] after the breakup of the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. [[Rystáll Sant/Legends|Rystáll Sant]] and [[Greeata Jendowanian/Legends|Greeata Jendowanian]] eventually rejoined the group, reforming the Max Rebo Band once again.<ref name="AtBPO:TBT" />
